articles.author: Gene Maddaus
articles.title: European Commission Approves Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger - Variety
articles.description: The European Commission approved the merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. on condition that Paramount divests from a joint venture with Universal.
articles.content:
The European Commissionapproved the merger of Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery on Wednesday, removing one of the few remaining obstacles to closing the $111 billion deal.
As a condition… [+2476 chars]
